name: Aishah Sofey & Sophie Rain
description:
Born in 2004, Sophie Rain has gained fame as an internet personality and a model. She has captivated audiences with her creative and engaging content on various social media platforms. With her alluring photos and videos, she showcases her unique lifestyle and fashion sense, which have cemented her place in the online world. Sophie has amassed an impressive following of 3.1 million on Instagram, where she actively interacts with her fans.

Aishah Sofey is a French-Canadian Instagram model who has gained popularity for her engaging lifestyle content on social media. With a focus on fitness and showcasing new outfits, Aishah has garnered a following of over 1.4 million followers on her Instagram account, aishahsofey. In addition to her Instagram presence, she expanded her social media reach by joining Twitter in 2018. Aishah has collaborated with friends and fellow influencers to create compelling content, one of her most well-received posts being a series of photos from her trip to Greece that received over 100,000 likes. Proud of her Filipina heritage, Aishah has used her platform to share aspects of her cultural background with her audience, creating a sense of connection and diversity.
creator: theSnakeBite
